name: Patient 10
history: Recent divorce with financial struggles. Adjusting to single life with co-parenting. Multiple friendships deteriorated. Complicated relationship with parents.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: I failed at marriage and now I'm failing at managing life alone.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm unlovable and destined to be alone forever.
coping_strategies: Managing financial paperwork, navigating single parenthood.
situation: Managing financial hardship following divorce, including handling financial paperwork.
auto_thought: I can't handle all this financial stuff on my own.
behavior: Process financial paperwork while feeling overwhelmed.
